introduction.title: Bounty Mission Gameplay
introduction.subtitle: Participate in bounty missions, showcase your skills, and win generous rewards!

select.title: Select Missions
select.description: Browse available bounty missions and choose projects that suit your skills

submit.title: Submit Project
submit.description: Log in to your account and submit project link before Tuesday noon 12:00 UTC-0 for last week's mission

evaluate.title: Evaluation & Awards
evaluate.description: Admin reviews and evaluates, updates last week's mission progress on Wednesday noon 12:00 UTC-0

reward.title: Get Rewards
reward.description: Winners will receive bounty rewards. Please complete your profile. Prize money will be distributed next Monday after results are announced.

rules.title: Mission Guidelines
items: Mission Status: Open (accepting submissions), Pending (under review), Closed (ended)

Mission Requirements: 1) Bounty mission descriptions are for inspiration only—feel free to create and express; the more engaging, the better. 2) Projects must be fully functional with a polished UI and an English version (multi-language support is preferred). Demos are not accepted. 3) All projects must be original work. Remixing or plagiarism is strictly prohibited.
How to View Winning Projects:Check your submitted mission status via "My Submission", or navigate to "Closed" Missions and click "View Winning Project".
Mission Submission: One submission per mission, with editing allowed (go to "My Submission" → "Edit").

Reward Reminder: Update your personal information accurately in the "Profile" module to ensure reward delivery within one week of winning. The platform will not be held responsible for payment errors due to incorrect information.

submitDialog.title: Submit Mission: {{title}}
submitDialog.note: Please provide a working project URL and ensure the link is accessible
submitDialog.socialMediaPlaceholder: Any social media platform share link
submitDialog.socialMediaNote: Please provide a valid social media share link for your project. Only users who share to social media are eligible for winner selection.
submitDialog.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid https:// URL
submitDialog.invalidSocialUrl: Please provide a valid social media share link (supports any social media platform)

comments.title: Mission Comments
comments.noComments: No comments yet, be the first to comment!

countdown.title: Countdown to Submission Deadline for Open Bounty Mission

maliciousSubmissionPolicy.title: Malicious Submission Policy
maliciousSubmissionPolicy.description: Any malicious submissions including but not limited to: content containing spam, scam attempts, inappropriate material, or intentionally harmful links will be immediately disqualified. Users who submit malicious content may face permanent account suspension from bounty missions.

maliciousPolicy.title: Malicious Submission Policy
maliciousPolicy.description: User accounts found engaging in malicious submission behaviors will be directly added to the bounty task blacklist. Such behaviors include, but are not limited to:
behaviors: Submissions that do not align with the task's core theme
Submitting a single work to multiple tasks
Repeatedly submitting incorrect or irrelevant projects
maliciousPolicy.enforcement: This policy is enforced to ensure the fairness and efficiency of the bounty task ecosystem.

submissions.noSubmissionsDesc: Go to mission display page to participate in bounty missions!
submissions.socialMediaPlaceholder: Any social media platform share link

tabs.emptyOpen: No missions are currently open. Click the button above to create a new mission.

createTask.initialParticipantsHint: Sets the mission's initial participant count, which updates automatically based on actual submissions
